title: Execution eval annotation
description: Canonical contract for execution quality annotations. Logical annotations and Phoenix wire annotation payload entries both use the uniform quality roll-up name. Human and model Judges share the execution rubric in rubrics/execution-quality.md.

annotation_name.description: Canonical execution annotation names. quality is the roll-up used for default gates. accepted_packet_sufficiency and pause_state_correctness remain reserved deterministic-check names required by the shared resolver contract.

annotator_kind.description: CODE is reserved for deterministic-check storage. HUMAN and LLM are peer judgments over the same rubric.

quality_label.description: Default-Judge label set: pass | needs_revision | blocking_failure. Default score bands for HUMAN and LLM quality annotations: pass 0.80-1.00, needs_revision 0.40-0.79, blocking_failure 0.00-0.39 or any critical failure mode that invalidates the PR.

pass_band.description: Default score band for the pass label.

needs_revision_band.description: Default score band for the needs_revision label.

blocking_failure_band.description: Default score band for the blocking_failure label.

no_workflow_state_keys.description: Denylist for Phoenix-bound metadata: no Teami workflow or queue state may be stored in Phoenix.

annotation_metadata.description: Shared annotation metadata. HUMAN and LLM quality annotations must record rubric and failure taxonomy versions.

failure_modes.description: Failure mode ids drawn from failure-taxonomy.json.

failure_mode_details.description: Optional parameterized details for deterministic checks.

identifier.description: Human/user id, Judge id, or code evaluator id. Required and non-empty because Phoenix upserts by name, target, and identifier.

phoenix_wire_annotation.title: Phoenix wire annotation shape
phoenix_wire_annotation.description: One entry of the data array sent to the Phoenix REST annotation endpoints.
